[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000000 a
1 0010000 1
2 0000110 2
3 0011001 3
4 1000001 2
5 0001000 1
6 0100000 1
7 0010001 2

01 10 1000001 2 match 4
12 21 0000000 a match 0

34 43 0010000 1 match 1
45 54 0000001 1
56 65 0000011 2
67 76 0000000 a match 0
70 07 1100000 2

13 31 0000000 a match 0

57 75 0000000 a match 0
60 06 0001001 2

47 74 0000000 a match 0

72 27 0000000 a match 0
